items.title: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM)’s Quantum Computing Could “Reinvent Finance,” Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 15 Stocks Jim Cramer Mentioned As He Said Quantum Computing Worried Him. International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently discussed. While Cramer did express worries about quantum computing in this episode, he still believes that International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is a strong player in the […]

items.title: Honeywell's Board Approves 5% Increase in Dividend Rate
items.description: HON lifts its quarterly dividend 5% to $1.19 per share, marking the 16th straight annual increase since 2010.
